subcodes.first_line: O Herald of the Covenant! The adornment of the unseen and visible worlds, and the exaltation of the realities of existence, lie in servitude unto the Lord of Divine Purpose [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای منادی میثاق زینت عالم غیب و شهود و علویت حقائق وجود عبودیت حضرت مقصود است
subcodes.subjects: @divine grace, bounty, confirmations; spiritual capacity, @servitude; submission to God; repentance, @service to others; to the Cause of God
